accessories, attachments and add-ons.

![Image 2](https://miramedtech.com/media/24624e6c367818dfc74a74cdae1aebcf.jpg)

Our unique treatment improves skin condition and solves all skin problems visible after the first treatment. Unlike traditional treatments, it is performed with a device that combines vacuum with infusion of active ingredients deep into the skin, rather than manually and separately, ensuring deeper penetration and long-lasting esults.

Our goal is to provide the customer with devices

that meet the highest global standards. That is

why we have divided responsibilities and duties

between companies that specialize in specific

activities. Our devices are manufactured under

strict supervision in conditions that meet the

highest world standards ISO 9001. We are in the

process of implementing ISO 13485 to expand our

global operations. This transaction combines

synergies, increases efficiency, reduces costs and

accelerates all our projects by providing our

combined teams the opportunity to drive

innovation more quickly and deliver more value

to our distributors and our end-users.

Our mission

The company’s goal is to build awareness of the unique technology developed, which the MIRApeel device uses. It is the only device of its kind that provides such a wide range of treatment options. One device uses 5 different technologies that can be used separately or in combination, acting synergistically. Our non-invasive treatment improves skin condition and solves all skin problems visible after the first treatment. Unlike traditional treatments, it is performed with a device that combines vacuum with infusion of active ingredients deep into the skin, rather than manually and separately, ensuring deeper penetration and long-lasting results.

We are committed to building long-term partnerships with our distributors. Thanks to this approach and mutual relations, we deliver a device that meets the expectations of the market, but also of our customers, as they are the ones who point us in the direction of development and improvement of our offer.

Why Should MIRApeel be Your Choice for Distribution?

MIRApeel's technology is at the forefront, offering a unique blend

of microdermabrasion, microneedling, and serum infusion. This

trifecta of advanced treatments ensures not only optimal results

but also a comfortable and rejuvenating experience for the end-

users. By associating with MIRApeel, distributors are positioning

themselves with a brand synonymous with cutting-edge solutions

and unwavering quality.

📈 Who Should Consider Distributing MIRApeel?

✨ Med Spa Owners: Add a feather to your cap with MIRApeel’s

multi-functional approach to skincare.

✨ Skincare Clinics: Provide your clients with the latest in skincare

technology.

✨ Aestheticians: Give your services an edge with this all-in-one

skincare solution.

🤝 How to Become a Distributor 🤝 We are keen on partnering

with distributors who share our passion for innovative skincare

solutions. If you are interested contact us.
